From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

[![logo](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/9/99/Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg/40px-Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg.png)](/wiki/File:Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg)

Look up ***[Peshawari](https://en.wiktionary.org/wiki/Peshawari "wiktionary:Peshawari")*** in Wiktionary, the free dictionary.

**[Peshawari](/wiki/Peshawari "Peshawari")** is a person or item that is associated with Peshawar, a city in Pakistan.

**Peshawari** may also refer to:

* [Peshawari (people)](/wiki/Peshawari_(people) "Peshawari (people)"), or Hindkowans
* [Peshawari chappal](/wiki/Peshawari_chappal "Peshawari chappal"), traditional footwear
* [Peshawari turban](/wiki/Peshawari_turban "Peshawari turban"), traditional headwear
* [Peshawari naan](/wiki/Naan "Naan"), style of bread

## People

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Peshawari_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: People")]

* [Abdur Rahman Peshawari](/wiki/Abdur_Rahman_Peshawari "Abdur Rahman Peshawari") (1886–1925), Turkish soldier, journalist and diplomat
* [Uzair Gul Peshawari](/wiki/Uzair_Gul_Peshawari "Uzair Gul Peshawari") (1886-1989), Islamic scholar and freedom activist
